themes.label: Wisdom
themes.summary: This chapter points toward wisdom, understanding, discernment, counsel, or instruction. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 8 verses. Commentary leans on "He who 'loveth wisdom' rejoices his father, but one who 'keepeth company with harlots' spends...". Word-study detail reinforces "חָ֭כְמָה: wisdom - wisdom (in a good sense)".
